enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Rettai kadire?

The song conveys themes of love and connection, expressing the emotions of being close yet distant from a loved one.

How does Maattrraan relate to the song?

The song plays a significant role in the movie, highlighting the romantic moments between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Rettai kadire?

The song features a collaboration of talented singers including Balaji, Krish, Mili, and Sharmil.

Who composed the music for Rettai kadire?

The music was composed by the renowned Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his captivating melodies.

When was Rettai kadire released?

The song was released on July 14, 2012, as part of the Maattrraan soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rettai kadire, the singers beautifully express the complexities of love, capturing the essence of longing and connection. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Maattrraan, where the characters navigate their feelings amidst challenges. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, the track evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The collaboration of multiple voices adds depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rettai kadire from the movie Maattrraan is a mesmerizing blend of voices that captures the essence of love and longing. With the unique collaboration of singers Balaji, Krish, Mili, and Sharmil, this song resonates deeply with its romantic undertones. The enchanting music by Harrish Jeyaraj elevates the emotional experience, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Twin shadows, here you and I are together, why the distance? In every place, you and I are connected, don't forget our bond.
Steady, steady, steady, steady, steady, steady, steady.
Different colors, different skies, the love between two is unique.
When the storm strikes, a bird flies away... Flowers bloom in the wind, these flowers are waiting in the breeze.
Twin shadows, here you and I are together, why the distance? In every place, you and I are connected, don't forget our bond.
You, you, you, you, you, you, you, you.
You touch me, you, you, you, you touch me, you, you, you.
The body is like a shell, but the soul is alive, both have grown together.
What happened to me, what happened to you, now the world has a new perspective.
This one is on one side, that one is on the other, which is which? When a flower and a head come together, is it a union?
Twin shadows, here you and I are together, why the distance? In every place, you and I are connected, don't forget our bond.
His words fall like raindrops, his other words are like arrows, they are alone.
Like a river, his heart flows, like a great storm, his actions affect everyone.
His reflection shows a form in front of him, even if separated, it remains a connection.
ooh ooh ooho ..yeah yeah.. pa pa pa pa pa ooh ooh ooho ..yeah yeah.. yeah yeah yeahh..
Twin shadows, here you and I are together, why the distance? In every place, you and I are connected, don't forget our bond.
Steady, steady, steady, steady, steady, steady, steady.
We have come a long way... here to stay... we stood united every single day.
